titles.title: Job Corps Shipbuilding-Defense Industrial Base Pipeline Act of 2026
Job Corps Shipbuilding-Defense Industrial Base Pipeline Act of 2026
A bill to provide for alignment of the Job Corps with the defense industrial base, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
